creator: Vicente Aranda
description: At the outbreak of the Spanish Civil War, the nun Maria is forced to flee her convent. She takes refuge in a brothel, until it is liberated by a woman's anarchist group. Maria joins the group and eventually goes to the front. The women's group faces the problems of fighting not only the nationalists, but also factions on the left seeking to impose a more traditional military structure. Further reading Women in the Spanish Revolution (Sparrows' Nest Library and Archive) Martha A. Ackelsberg's book on the free women of Spain, the Mujeres Libres (Libcom) Mujeres Libres - De vrije vrouwen van Spanje (anarchisme.nl)
